Gorillaz
What will happen?
The amazing band Gorillaz is coming to Suffolk!
They will be coming to Christchurch Park at 3pm on 3
rd
of March
2026.
What songs?
They will be playing twenty of their most popular songs:
• 1. Clint Eastwood
• 2. Feel Good Inc.
• 3. DARE
• 4. Dirty Harry
• 5. Tomorrow Comes Today
• 6. On Melancholy Hill
• 7. Stylo
• 8. 19-2000
• 9. Empire Ants
• 10. Re-Humanize Yourself
• 11. Saturnz Barz
• 12. Andromeda
• 13. Plastic Beach
• 14. Superfast Jellyfish
• 15. The Less You Know, The Better
• 16. Ascension
• 17. Rhinestone Eyes
• 18. Tranz
• 19. Busted and Blue
• 20. M1 A1
How much will it cost?
• Per adult: £20
• Per child: £10
• Family of four: £45
